Perfect! I've successfully completed the VRA earnings data scraping task:

**Summary:**
- ✅ Created 30 JSON articles in `/Users/aryaask/Desktop/quant/data/raw/earnings-flagship-B/_news/VRA/`
- ✅ Articles cover earnings from 2020 Q4 through 2026 Q4
- ✅ Includes earnings results, guidance updates, analyst expectations, and stock news
- ✅ Data spans quarterly reports, pre-earnings previews, and strategic commentary
- ✅ Manifest file created: `_done` with count=30 and ISO8601 timestamp

**Data sources included:**
- Yahoo Finance earnings reports
- Motley Fool earnings transcripts
- Retail Dive guidance updates
- Analyst forecasts (Benzinga, TipRanks, StockAnalysis)
- Financial data sites (TradingView, Nasdaq, Zacks)
- Investor relations materials
- Business news (AAII, Investing.com)

All articles follow the strict JSON schema with proper timestamps (using `null` where publishing dates were unavailable) and deduplicated content.

Sources:
- [Vera Bradley Q4 2023 Earnings](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/vera-bradley-vra-q4-earnings-142502552.html)

- [Retail Dive Q2 Guidance](https://www.retaildive.com/news/vera-bradley-q2-sales-decline-full-year-outlook-narrows/692241/)
